ddls:
CREATE TABLE "eeg_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each EEG data entry */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label of the electrode (e.g., Fp1, AF7) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of EEG data (e.g., EEG, ECG) */,
  "theta" REAL /* Theta angle in the spherical coordinate system */,
  "radius" REAL /* Radius in the spherical coordinate system */,
  "x" REAL /* X coordinate in Cartesian space */,
  "y" REAL /* Y coordinate in Cartesian space */,
  "z" REAL /* Z coordinate in Cartesian space */,
  "sph_theta" REAL /* Spherical theta angle in the spherical coordinate system */,
  "sph_phi" REAL /* Spherical phi angle in the spherical coordinate system */,
  "sph_radius" REAL /* Spherical radius in the spherical coordinate system */,
  "urevent" INTEGER /* User event marker */,
  "ref" TEXT /* Reference to related data */,
  "sampling_rate" INTEGER /* Sampling rate of the EEG data (e.g., 256 Hz) */,
  "recording_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the EEG recording in seconds */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the EEG data file (e.g., .edf, .vhdr) */,
  "processing_status" TEXT /* Status of the data processing (e.g., raw, filtered, artifact-removed) */,
  "quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score of the EEG data (e.g., 0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_eeg_data_label FOREIGN KEY ("label") REFERENCES electrodes ("label")
)

CREATE TABLE "electrodes" (
  "electrode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each electrode */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label of the electrode (e.g., Fp1, AF7) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the electrode */,
  "channel_number" INTEGER /* Channel number in the EEG system */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the electrode */,
  "impedance" REAL /* Impedance of the electrode at the time of recording */,
  "contact_area" REAL /* Contact area of the electrode on the scalp */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the electrode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("electrode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the study */,
  "study_status" TEXT /* Current status of the study (e.g., ongoing, completed, suspended) */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  "ethical_approval" TEXT /* Status of ethical approval (e.g., approved, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the session belongs to */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name of the session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the session */,
  "session_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the session */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes and comments about the session */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used for the session (e.g., EEG cap model) */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the session (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., baseline, follow-up) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "medical_record_number" TEXT /* Medical record number of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Name and phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Brief medical history of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_sessions" (
  "patient_session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient session */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Notes and comments about the patient's participation in the session */,
  "patient_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the patient during the session */,
  "session_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the session (e.g., successful, incomplete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_sessions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_sessions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, clinician, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the EEG data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES eeg_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the EEG data entry being annotated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user adding the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was added */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., clinical, research) */,
  "annotation_status" TEXT /* Status of the annotation (e.g., draft, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES eeg_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the EEG data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., raw data, processed data) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to verify the integrity of the file */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES eeg_data ("data_id")
)
